questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'a15a9b40-3f29-4235-866b-fbba4def1f88' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = 'd3ffc0b3-6166-47ff-b00f-194b9574c60d'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'a15a9b40-3f29-4235-866b-fbba4def1f88'; delete from question_items where id = 'a15a9b40-3f29-4235-866b-fbba4def1f88';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
